summary: Frontend testing of compact design on add pages (Customer, Supplier, Expense) and average price switch on Product pages. All features working correctly.

passed_tests.feature: Add Customer Dialog - 3-column layout for Name, Phone, Email
Add Customer Dialog - 4-column layout for Type, Discount, Debt Limit, Birthdate
Add Customer Dialog - Compact input height (h-9)
Add Supplier Dialog - 2-column layout for Name, Phone
Add Supplier Dialog - 2-column layout for Email, Family
Add Expense Dialog - 2-column layout for Category, Description
Add Expense Dialog - 2-column layout for Amount, Date
Add Product Page - useAveragePrice switch present
Add Product Page - Calculator icon with switch
Edit Product Page - useAveragePrice switch present
Edit Product Page - Switch toggleable (default unchecked)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ CustomersPage.js uses compact design with grid-cols-3 for basic fields and grid-cols-4 for type/discount fields
✓ SuppliersPage.js uses compact design with grid-cols-2 layout
✓ ExpensesPage.js uses compact design with grid-cols-2 layout
✓ AddProductPage.js has useAveragePrice state and Switch component with Calculator icon
✓ EditProductPage.js has useAveragePrice state and Switch component with Calculator icon
✓ All input fields using h-9 class for compact height
✓ All labels using text-xs class for smaller text
seed_data_creation: Created test customer 'TEST_زبون تجريبي' and test supplier 'TEST_مورد تجريبي' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All compact design features verified: Add Customer (3-col basic, 4-col type/discount, 3-col ID/register/family, 2-col address/notes), Add Supplier (2-col layout), Add Expense (2-col layout). Average price switch (useAveragePrice) exists on both AddProductPage and EditProductPage with Calculator icon and tooltip. Test data created: customer 'TEST_زبون تجريبي' and supplier 'TEST_مورد تجريبي'.
